title: Information Rights Agreement
description: Details corporate information disclosures (financial audits, quarterly boards) guaranteed to major equity holders.
whatsCovered: Requirement to deliver quarterly and annual financial statements
Annual budget and business plan delivery timelines
Investor inspection rights of facilities and corporate books
Threshold of share ownership to qualify for rights
whenToUse: Use this agreement to establish the reporting schedule and audit files that the startup must supply to major investors.

fields.label: Company Office Address
fields.placeholder: e.g. 100 Innovators Blvd, San Francisco, CA

clauses.heading: INFORMATION RIGHTS AGREEMENT
clauses.body: This startup agreement (the "Agreement") is entered into as of {effective_date} (the "Effective Date"), by and between {company_name}, located at {company_address} (the "Company"), and the counterparty or stakeholders executing this document below.

clauses.heading: 1. Core Agreement Terms
clauses.body: This agreement sets out the transaction and operational terms for Information Rights Agreement. The parties agree to coordinate in good faith to complete milestones, share resources, or grant rights as specified.

clauses.heading: 2. Information Disclosure Deadlines
clauses.body: Company shall deliver annual audits to {investor_name} within {annual_report_days} days of year-end, and quarterly statements within {quarterly_report_days} days of quarter-end.

clauses.heading: 3. Proprietary Information and Secrecy
clauses.body: Both parties agree to treat all financial metrics, corporate plans, cap tables, and research files received during the execution of this Agreement as confidential and proprietary.

clauses.heading: 4. Governing Law
clauses.body: This Agreement shall be governed and interpreted under the laws of the State/Country of {governing_state}.

faq.question: What is a major investor threshold?
faq.answer: It is the minimum number of shares or percentage (e.g. 10%) an investor must hold to be legally entitled to information rights.

faq.question: Are financial summaries confidential?
faq.answer: Yes, all data received under information rights is protected by strict non-disclosure obligations.
